title: KPIT Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: KPIT Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
